{{/* Modelplane mark + wordmark + "docs". The mark is the colour icon (legible on both themes); "modelplane" uses the theme text colour and "docs" the accent, so the lockup adapts to light and dark. Usage: {{ partial "brand" (dict "ctx" . "class" "bd-sidebar-brand") }} */}} {{ $cls := .class | default "bd-sidebar-brand" }} Modelplane docs
